name: flywheel
description: Standardize a compounding development flow from setup and ideation through execution, review, incident handling, rollout, shipping, and learning capture.

interface.shortDescription: Compound engineering leverage across the dev loop
interface.longDescription: Guide work from repo setup, ideation, and measured optimization through brainstorming, planning, execution, review, incident handling, rollout for risky changes, shipping, and captured learnings so each completed task makes the next one easier.
defaultPrompt: Use $flywheel:start to route this task through the right Flywheel stage.
Use $flywheel:research when the immediate job is topic investigation or current best-practice discovery before ideation, brainstorming, or planning.
Use $flywheel:setup to prove repo and machine readiness before work starts.
Use $flywheel:run to coordinate one bounded task through the remaining Flywheel stages.
Use $flywheel:architecture-strategy, $flywheel:pattern-recognition, $flywheel:maintainability, or $flywheel:simplify when a focused architecture or code-quality pass is the real need.
